name: Chocolate-Bran Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a shallow 11-inch x 7-inch baking pan with butter and line the bottom with parchment or waxed paper.
2. Melt chocolate, butter, and molasses together in a bowl placed over a pan of gently simmering water. Remove from heat.
3. Add apricots, prunes, and cereal to the chocolate mixture; mix thoroughly.
4. Spread the mixture in the prepared pan and smooth the top with the back of a spoon.
5. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours or until firmly set.
6. Loosen the mixture from the pan by running the tip of a knife around the inside edges of the pan.
7. Turn out onto a plate, remove the paper, and turn the mixture over.
8. Cut into 24 pieces. Arrange bars neatly on a serving dish or store in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
